title: A Syllable.
content:
Could mortal lip divine
    The undeveloped freight
    Of a delivered syllable,
    'T would crumble with the weight.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "A Syllable.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
